label: Federated & privacy-preserving learning

node.label: Federated & privacy-preserving learning
node.definition: Training is coordinated across separated data holders while limiting raw-data movement or information leakage.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Federated & privacy-preserving learning is to connect Distributed systems & networking, Datasets, sampling & splits to downstream capabilities including Privacy, governance, licensing & audit.
examples: substrate for Privacy, governance, licensing & audit
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Datasets, sampling & splits.

dependencies.rationale: Federated & privacy-preserving learning uses Distributed systems & networking as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Federated & privacy-preserving learning uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Federated & privacy-preserving learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
